meta.author: NASDAQ
meta.title: GENIUM™ Market Info TIP Specification BIST-2.2.8

revision.change: Initial version. For history versions see BIST-1.1.1.11.
Added new message BasicDataFixedIncome.
Added new message FixedIncomeSupplementary.
Added new message OrderMBO.
Added new messages Quote2 and Quote1.

RepoInterestAmount, CompoundYield, AccruedValue,WithholdingTax, ValueDate2CashValue, AmountOfCollateral, CollateralPrice, SettlementValue,SettlementPriceAtStartDate, SettlementPriceAtEndDate, PrincipalValue fields added to the Trade messages.
LastCompoundYield field added to the TradeStatistics3, TradeStatistics2 and TradeStatistics1 messages.
VWAP, Settlement and Yield fields added to the TradeStatistics3 and TradeStatistics2 messages.
Accumulated fields added to the TradeStatistics3 message.

FirstSettlementPrice, LastSettlementPrice, HighSettlementPrice, LowSettlementPrice, DiffLastSettlementPrice, SettlementPriceVWAP, BidCollateralPriceAtLevel1, AskCollateralPriceAtLevel1, BidYieldAtLevel1, AskYieldAtLevel1 fields added to the OrderbookSummary message.
BidCollateralPriceAtLevel, AskCollateralPriceAtLevel, BidYieldAtLevel, AskYieldAtLevel fields added to Orderbook3, Orderbook2 and Orderbook1 messages.
NoOfDecTradePrice in Tradable message is renamed to NoOfDecYield
RankedBidYield,RankedAskYield,RankedBidCollateralPrice,RankedAskCollateralPrice added to MBPOrderSnapshot message
Added new message BasicDataPreciousMetalsAndDiamonds
Added CrossTrade field to Trade2 message
Added CrossTrade field to Trade1 message
Added ExcludeCrossTradeFromStats field to BasicDataTradable message
Added BaseValue and BaseDate fields to BasicDataIndex message
Added MaxOrderValue field to BasicDataTradable message
Changed AccruedInterest field to Float 13,9
Removed ListingDate field from BasicDataMarket
Removed InstrumentExternalText, NoOfSettlementDays, TradedThroughDate fields from BasicDataTradable
Removed SettlementValue field from Trade1
Removed SettlementValue field from Trade2
Removed FirstSettlementPrice field from TradeStatistics2
Removed FirstSettlementPrice, AccumulatedSettlementValue field from TradeStatistics3
Added PMD_SessionClosed (47) and FixedIncome_RepoQuotation (48) states to State Code table
Removed FirstSettlementPrice field from OrderbookSummary
Removed TradedThroughDate field from BasicDataMarket

Removed TradedThroughDate, SettlementValue, RoundLotOnly, NoOfSettlementDays, InstrumentExternalText, FirstSettlementPrice, BidVolumeAtLevel1, AskVolumeAtLevel1, AccumulatedSettlementValue fields from TagDefinitions
Changed Divisor field Float 13,8 to Float 22,8
Changed WeightedFreeFloatMktValue and MarketCap fields Float 13,6 to Float 22,6
Flush field added to MarketMakerQuote1 and MarketMakerQuote2 messages
FirstTradingDate, FirstTradingTime, LastTradingDate, LastTradingTime fields are added to BasicDataTradable
Changed Enum RepublicCoinGroup name to CoinGroup, added new item named gram
Changed Enum RepublicCoinType name to CoinType, added OneGram and HalfGram items
Changed Enum RepublicCoinYear name to CoinYear
Added InstrumentClassification field to BasicDataFixedIncome message
Added 'Double' data type
Changed MarketCap field data type 'String' to 'Double' at IndexSummary
Changed MarketCap, WeightPercent, WeightingFactor, WeightedFreeFloatMktValue fields data type 'String' to 'Double' at IndexWeight
Changed Divisor field data type 'String' to 'Double' at IndexDivisor
Changed MarketCap, WeightPercent, WeightingFactor, WeightedFreeFloatMktValue fields data type 'String' to 'Double' at NonBistIndexMember
Added TradeInfo field to Trade1 and Trade2 messages
Changed OutstandingAmount field Float 16,6 to Float 15,0
Changed Divisor field size Double 22,8 to Double 23,8
Changed WeightPercent field size Double 15,12 to Double 16,12
Changed WeightingFactor field size Double 15,12 to Double 16,12
Changed WeightedFreeFloatMktValue field size Double 22,6 to Double 23,6
Changed MarketCap field size Double 22,6 to Double 23,6
Added new message BasicDataDeliverableSerie
Added DeliverableSeriesId field to BasicDataFixedIncome message
ACTISDA, BB30360, ISDA30360 added to DayCountMethod. ACT364 value changed to 15. Previous value of ACT364 was 7
Changed CouponFrequency field String 20 to Double 19,10
Changed CouponRate field Float 13,6 to Double 19,10
Added BidSettlementPrice, AskSettlementPrice to Orderbook1, Orderbook2, Orderbook3 messages
Added RankedBidOrderKey, RankedAskOrderKey to MBPOrderSnapshot message
RankedBidPrice, RankedBidVolume, RankedAskPrice, RankedAskVolume, RankedBidYield, RankedBidCollateralPrice, RankedAskYield, RankedAskCollateralPrice field's tags renamed to smaller ones
Changed NominalValue field size Float 13,6 to Double 20,9
Changed NominalValue field size Double 20,9 to Double 20,15
Added ClearingInfo field to Trade1 and Trade2 messages
NonBistIndexMember message removed
Added Symbol, Isin fields to IndexWeight message
Added Symbol, Isin fields to BasicDataIndexMember message
Added OpeningSession_woEQ (51), OneSidedAuctionPeriod_woEQ (52), OrderCollectionPeriodAfterCB_woEQ (53), ClosingSession_woEQ (54), SinglePriceAuction_woEQ (55) states to State Code table
Added AllocationPrice message
Added Factor field to BasicDataDerivative message
TLREFLinkedBondsSimpleWeightedAverage, TLREFLinkedBondsCompounded, TLREFLinkedBondsIndexBased added to FixedIncomeType
Removed WithholdingTax,ValueDate2CashValue field from Trade1 and Trade2 messages
Added Break_AfterHours (56), Suspend_AfterHours (57) and CancelOrders (58) states to State Code table
Added IndexClassification field to BasicDataFixedIncome message
Added ValueDate,ResetDate field to BasicDataDerivative message
Added OrderCollectionPeriodAfterMWCB (59), OrderCollectionPeriodAfterMWCB_woEQ (60), Uncrossing_MWCB (61) and Suspend_MWCB (62) states to State Code table
Added Swap (9) to DerivativeType
FixedIncomeSupplementary message name changed to Supplementary message
Added DeliveryDate field to BasicDataDerivative message
Added Quotation (63) state to State Code table
Added DateSettlementPrice field to SettlementPrice message
Changed description of DateTradeCancel (DCt) field
Changed BaseValue field Float(13,6) to Double(18,6)
Changed OldIndexValue field Float(13,6) to Double(18,6)
Changed OpenValue field Float(13,6) to Double(18,6)
Changed ClosingValue field Float(13,6) to Double(18,6)
Changed HighValue field Float(13,6) to Double(18,6)
Changed LowValue field Float(13,6) to Double(18,6)
Changed DiffDayNom field Float(13,6) to Double(18,6)
Changed CurrentValue field Float(13,6) to Double(18,6)
Added ShortSellValidation field to BasicDataTradable message
Added TradableInfo message
Added FixedIncomeClassification field to BasicDataFixedIncome message
Removed VWAP, VWAPDiffPer, SettlementPriceVWAP, CompoundYieldVWAP, ValidationVWAP, YieldVWAP fields from TradeStatistics2 message
Removed ShortSellEnabled, ShortSellValidation fields from BasicDataTradable message
Removed ShortSellEnabled, ShortSellValidation fields from TradableInfo message
Added ShortSaleRestriction field to BasicDataTradable message
Added ShortSaleRestriction field to TradableInfo message
Changed FreeFloatRatio field Float(13,6) to Double(18,6)
Added LastTradingDate, LastTradingTime field to TradableInfo message
BasePrice (RPr) field definition changed
Added TradeRectify, TimestampTradeRectify, DateTradeRectify fields to Trade1 and Trade2 messages
TradeNumber description updated for Trade1 and Trade2 messages

reply-messages.category: Basic Data - Exchange and Market Hierarchy Messages
Basic Data - Index, Lists, and Sectors: Security Groups
